What We Cover

Our Specialisations

Where ambition meets opportunity — we place Singapore's finest professionals into roles that define careers.

🏦
Banking & Finance
Front, middle & back office roles across banks, asset managers and financial institutions.
💻
Technology
Software engineers, IT infrastructure, cybersecurity, data and product roles.
📊
Accounting & Finance
CFOs, controllers, finance analysts, tax specialists and audit professionals.
👥
Human Resources
HR business partners, talent acquisition leads, L&D and compensation specialists.
📣
Sales & Marketing
Business development managers, brand directors, digital and performance marketers.
🔗
Supply Chain
Procurement managers, logistics leads, category directors and operations roles.
The Process

How we work with you

A clear, honest process from first conversation to successful placement.

01
Discovery Call
We take time to understand your role requirements, team culture, timeline, and compensation expectations.
02
Targeted Search
Our consultants tap into our active Singapore network and candidate database to find the right fit.
03
Shortlist & Debrief
We present a curated shortlist with detailed profiles and our honest recommendation for each candidate.
04
Placement & Support
We manage offer negotiations, onboarding support, and follow up at 30, 60, and 90 days post-placement.

Why Choose Us

The Apex Flex difference

01
Deep Singapore market knowledge
Our consultants live and work in Singapore. We understand local hiring norms, MOM EP/S-Pass requirements, and realistic salary benchmarks across every level.
02
Specialist, not generalist
We focus on a defined set of industries so our networks run deep. You deal with consultants who genuinely know your sector and the people in it.
03
Candid, transparent communication
We tell you what is realistic on timelines, salaries, and talent availability. No over-promising. No wasted time.
04
Post-placement partnership
We check in at 30, 60 and 90 days to ensure both employer and candidate are set up for long-term success.
05
MOM licensed and fully compliant
Apex Flex Partners Pte. Ltd. is a fully licensed Employment Agency under Singapore's Ministry of Manpower — giving you complete peace of mind.
Add your team photo here A real photo of your team or office builds significant trust with clients and candidates.
